heading: Jurisdiction to compel production of records or papers
label: 20705 Jurisdiction to compel production of records or papers
text: The United States district court for the district in which a demand is made pursuant to , or in which a record or paper so demanded is located, shall have jurisdiction by appropriate process to compel the production of such record or paper.section 20703 of this title
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 1974d of Title 42
